article.excerpt: With the growing community interest in Gatsby, we hope to create more resources that make it easier for anyone to grasp the power of this incredible tool.

authors.bio: Hi, I'm Gurusabarish, a passionate web developer and ML engineer from India. I tend to make use of modern web technologies to build websites that looks great, feels fantastic, and functions correctly.
